# 🎯 Task 04.2: ISBN & Price Extraction

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 4 days | **M2** | **P1** | **Depends:** 04.1 ✅ | **Blocks:** 04.3

## 🎬 Build
Universal regex for ISBN-10/13 and multi-currency price patterns. Works for any language/script.

## 📋 Days
**D1:** ISBN patterns (10/13 formats)  
**D2:** Multi-currency price regex  
**D3:** Integration with schema parser  
**D4:** Test 1000+ product pages

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ISBN extraction reaches ≥90% precision on labeled book/product pages.
- [ ] Price detection reaches ≥85% precision across multiple currencies.
- [ ] Rial/toman, Persian digits, Arabic digits, separators, and mixed Persian/English formats are covered.
- [ ] Extracted values include confidence and source field.

## 📊 Quality Evidence
- [ ] Attach precision/recall report for ISBN and price extraction.
- [ ] Include false-positive examples such as phone numbers, dates, tracking IDs, and unrelated numeric strings.
- [ ] Include Persian/Iran commerce examples before marking complete.
- [ ] Link to the latest M1.5 evaluation report if price/ISBN signals affect ranking.

## 🎉 Celebrate: Extract book ISBNs and prices!
## 📦 Delivers: `isbn_price_extractor.py`
## 🚀 Next: 04.3 (Structured Boost)
